title: Father & Son
overview: Iman, an unpopular teenager at school, spends her days caring for a father who is completely disabled, leaving no social opportunities. After the father died, there was closeness between father and son. It's just that his father is now in the form of an ignorant spirit, which leads him to find love and rise up against the bullies at school.
